name: io.github.atomno-labs/mcp-sudact
description: Russian court case-law search for AI agents — full-text search across court decisions with filters by law article, court, instance and dates; fetch full decision text. Hosted engine, fresh data, atomno API key required.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_SUDACT_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for hosted search and document retrieval.
